calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SUTTER BAY HOSPITALS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to the sole cause of action in the complaint for personal injury is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
